reports.title: The Ceasefire That Was Never a Ceasefire
reports.subtitle: Iran pulls out of second-round talks as the US seizes a cargo ship and the two-week truce expires in 48 hours.

reports.title: Tariffs Ruled Illegal, Then Hiked to 15%
reports.subtitle: The Supreme Court struck down Trump's IEEPA tariffs as unconstitutional, so Trump raised them under a different legal theory.

reports.title: The AI Model Too Dangerous to Release (Except to the Government)
reports.subtitle: Anthropic withheld Mythos from the public for being too capable at cyberattacks, then flew its CEO to the White House to discuss federal access.

reports.title: The Government That Made Apple Delete Its Own Critics
reports.subtitle: A federal judge found the Trump administration coerced Facebook and Apple into removing ICE-tracking tools, ruling it a First Amendment violation.

reports.title: The Fed's New Chair Will Inherit a Trap
reports.subtitle: Kevin Warsh faces his Senate confirmation hearing Tuesday as Trump demands rate cuts, oil spikes, and inflation shows no signs of cooperating.

reports.title: The Social Media Ban That Already Failed
reports.subtitle: Australia's under-16 ban went global this week as governments launched an EU age-verification app, a world leaders summit, and Australian legal threats. The app was hacked in two minutes.
